creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232252
Patch arcanist/phabricator for PHP 8.x

Hi Gleb,

I produced a patch to update/fix arcanist and phabricator for 8.x (so it builds on 8.1 now and includes patches for 8 in general).

I don't have the time to test this on my personal instance right now (will do later), so maybe if you have a chance, your assistance in testing would be welcome.

Best
Michael
